# Security Policy

## Supported Versions

We only support the latest version of the SRM Classes platform. If you find a security issue, please ensure you are running the most recent version before reporting.

| Version | Supported          |
| ------- | ------------------ |
| v1.0.x  | ✅ Supported       |
| < v1.0  | ❌ Not Supported   |

## Reporting a Vulnerability

If you discover a potential security vulnerability in this project, please **do not open a public issue.** Instead, please report it privately:

1. Send an email to **srmclasses01@gmail.com**.
2. Include details of the vulnerability and steps to reproduce it.

We will acknowledge your report and work on a fix as soon as possible. Thank you for helping keep SRM Classes secure!
